label: Measured local tide-gauge trend converted to ft/century
notes: NOAA Station 9419750 reports -0.77 mm/yr relative mean sea-level trend for 1933-2024; converted to feet per century for display.

label: NOAA 2020-2050 U.S. coastline average rise
notes: NOAA technical report gives 10-12 inches average U.S. coastline rise from 2020 to 2050.

label: OPC Crescent City 2100 intermediate scenario
notes: Station-scale planning range cited in manuscript; values converted from 0.11 m median-range low 0.42 m median and 0.88 m high to feet.

label: OPC high-end H++ planning stress test
notes: High-end Antarctic ice-loss planning scenario cited for Crescent City as stress-test exposure not expected median planning value.

label: Modeled coseismic subsidence from future Cascadia rupture
notes: One-to-two-meter modeled coseismic subsidence range converted to feet; year 9999 means event timing unknown and is not plotted as a calendar forecast.
